message:
feat(mcp): implement agent filter for wa.state tool

The MCP wa.state tool accepted an agent parameter but logged a warning
and returned unfiltered results. Now filters panes by inferred agent
type from title, matching codex/claude_code/gemini with the same logic
used in wa status --agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
